action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 21 achieved a new best test AP of 0.2533 by doubling TTA to 32 runs per model (64 total) at batch size 1024. Remaining time is only ~25 minutes, making additional training infeasible. Analysis: Test-time augmentation is producing consistent gains by averaging stochastic dropout variations. The next reliable, zero-cost step is to further increase TTA runs to 64 per model (128 total forward passes) and raise inference batch size to 2048 for better GPU throughput. Enabling TF32 matrix multiplication will also accelerate inference. Decision: Update predict.py with these heavier TTA settings, then submit eval immediately.
